mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ADMIN_SESSIONS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ADMIN_SESSIONS ( session_id, admin_id, refresh_token, ip_address, user_agent, revoked_yn, expires_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{adminId}, #{refreshToken}, #{ipAddress, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'N', #{expiresAt}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ADMIN_SESSIONS WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND revoked_yn = 'N' AND expires_at > SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul'
SELECT * FROM ADMIN_SESSIONS WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE ADMIN_SESSIONS SET revoked_yn = 'Y', revoked_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND revoked_yn = 'N'
